ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the order */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the order */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the order */,
  "customer_age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the customer */,
  "customer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was delivered */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to pay for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order was shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address from which the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in kilograms */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier who provides the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Selling price per unit of the product */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit from the sale */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the products sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of any returns */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was returned, if applicable */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the customer */,
  "customer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country this state belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the financial metrics */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost incurred for the order */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the order */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit from the order */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross margin percentage */,
  "return_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with returns */,
  "return_profit" REAL /* Profit lost due to returns */,
  "net_revenue" REAL /* Net revenue after returns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
